reason_for_decision: The article clearly explains UAM as a system concept inside AAM, separates aircraft from infrastructure and traffic-management requirements, and is strong enough to pass without revision.
strengths: The article clearly separates UAM from the broader AAM umbrella without flattening the terms into one concept.
It makes the system nature of UAM concrete by covering aircraft, vertiports, traffic management, trust, and monitoring together.
The security section gives practical value by explaining how more legitimate low-altitude traffic changes the monitoring problem.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable, technically grounded, and useful enough to pass without revision.
